title: Workflow — review existing load test script for methodology issues
expected_feedback: Review mode + Standard depth. Findings: (1) Standard: single user ID — cache bias (use SharedArray with realistic data). (2) Standard: no error rate threshold — add http_req_failed SLO. (3) Hygiene: no think time between requests — not modeling real user behavior. (4) Hygiene: no ramp-down stage — connection cleanup issues may be hidden. Good: warmup excluded from thresholds, 3-min steady state, gradual ramp-up.
